searchBroadLoading: Loading all topics for this letter...

uiTourSteps.title: The knowledge map
uiTourSteps.body: This is your forest: drag the background to pan, and tap or click the circles to open branches and lessons.

uiTourSteps.title: Back to the map
uiTourSteps.body: The logo returns you to the tree home when you want a clean overview.

uiTourSteps.title: Trees & libraries
uiTourSteps.body: Switch curriculum, load other knowledge trees, or manage content versions.

uiTourSteps.title: Search topics
uiTourSteps.body: Open search to jump to a topic by name without walking every branch.

uiTourSteps.title: Arcade
uiTourSteps.body: Play friendly practice games that can adapt to what you are studying.

uiTourSteps.title: Construction mode
uiTourSteps.body: Turn this on to add folders and lessons, or reorganize editable trees.

uiTourSteps.title: Profile & backpack
uiTourSteps.body: Your avatar opens the menu: profile, export progress, achievements, and more.

uiTourSteps.title: Full handbook
uiTourSteps.body: The detailed guide lives here: navigation, garden, AI, data, and shortcuts.

uiTourSteps.title: The owl (Sage)
uiTourSteps.body: Ask questions, get summaries, or set up optional AI help when you want an extra nudge.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: The map
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Explore by dragging and tapping nodes to open topics and lessons.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: Home
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Return to the main tree view from anywhere.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: Search
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Find lessons by name without crossing the whole map.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: Sage
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Open the owl for questions, summaries, or AI settings.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: Arcade
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Practice games tied to what you are learning.

uiTourStepsMobile.title: More
uiTourStepsMobile.body: Profile, full guide, trees, achievements, language, and tools live in this menu.

welcomeSteps.title: Get started
welcomeSteps.text:
Important: Arborito is a self-directed knowledge map. Lesson material is community-sourced; any certificates are symbolic, not formal credentials. An AI assistant is available only if you choose to use it.

Your data: Progress is stored in this browser. To keep a backup or move to another device, open Profile and export your backpack file.

aiPitchSub: Tap the owl 🦉 whenever you are ready.
mediaConsentBody: Only resources from the origins you approve below will load. Your browser will connect to those domains to fetch the image, audio, or video.
mediaConsentRememberHint: If you check «do not ask again», we store only those domain origins in this browser (not the full URLs).
mediaConsentDontAskAgain: Remember these domains in this browser
mediaBlockedHint: This resource has not been loaded yet.
aboutTreesysProductLine: Arborito is a product of Treesys
missionText: Arborito is the open education platform driven by Treesys, the organization behind this ecosystem. Learn at your own pace, explore a living map of ideas, and give something back: a fix, a translation, a new lesson. Education is a human right, not a business—and every honest contribution helps the forest keep growing.
metaphorText: Like a tree, knowledge is nourished by the community (roots) to expand its branches and offer leaves of wisdom (lessons) to anyone who wishes to explore them.
impressumText:
Arborito™ is a product of Treesys®.

Liability Disclaimer: The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. Treesys is not an accredited educational institution and does not confer academic degrees. Certificates generated by this software are for gamification and self-tracking purposes only.

External Links: We accept no liability for the content of external links (e.g., third-party knowledge trees). The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

certBody: This certifies that the student has successfully completed the module:
sourceManagerDesc: Explore the global forest or plant your own garden.
sourceSwitchSuccess: Switched to a new knowledge universe
sourceWarning: You are using a third-party knowledge source. Content is the responsibility of its publisher.
secWarningBody: You are about to add an external knowledge tree that has NOT been verified by the Arborito team. Anyone can clone a repository and impersonate an official institution.
secWarningCheck: Please verify that the URL comes from a trusted source:
secLoadWarningBody: This link is trying to load a knowledge tree from an external source that has NOT been verified by the Arborito team. Do you want to proceed?
errorNoContent: No valid content found in this tree.
fileNotFound: File not found in local garden.
saveFailedLocal: Local save failed. Node not found.
noSourcesFound: No sources found with that name.
exitWarningText: You have an evaluation in progress. If you leave, your current progress will be lost.
exportDesc: Choose what you want to download.
emptyModuleDesc: This branch has no published lessons yet. Arborito is community-driven—you can propose content or improvements in the curriculum repository.
contribDesc: Help us grow the garden. Connect your GitHub account to enable the "Edit" button on lessons and submit improvements to the team.
contribNote: Note: You need a Personal Access Token (Classic) with "repo" permissions.
contribTokenError: Invalid or expired token. Please click the link to generate a new one.
prSuccessBody: A Pull Request has been created successfully. The community will review your contribution.
adminConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
adminConfirmDeleteFolder:
⚠️ DANGER: This folder contains {count} files.
Are you sure you want to delete EVERYTHING in '{name}'?
This cannot be undone.
adminFolderEmptyRename: Folder is empty or cannot be renamed.
editorMetaWarning:
You are editing folder properties.
Use the top panel to change Name, Icon, and Order.
pdfDisclaimerText:
This document was automatically generated by Arborito, a decentralized knowledge explorer.
Source Repository: {url}

The content, text, images, and intellectual property contained herein belong exclusivley to the authors and maintainers of the external repository linked above. Arborito (Treesys) acts solely as a visualization engine and assumes no responsibility for the accuracy, legality, copyright status, or safety of the material presented in this document. Users are responsible for verifying the source of the information.
profileDesc: Customize your appearance and manage your progress.
exportDesc_Profile: Download a file to save your progress.
importDesc: Load a tree file (.json) into your local garden.
editorBlockCallout: Write a tip or important note here…
syncConflict: Cloud data found. Do you want to load your progress from the cloud? This will overwrite your local progress.
googleSyncDesc: Optional: Sign in to sync automatically across devices.
sageWakeDesc: The friendly owl is ready to help.
sageHello: 🦉 Hoot hoot! I am awake. Ask me anything.
sageError: The owl is a bit confused — try again.
sageConfigDesc: Choose how the owl answers (optional AI).
sageOllamaHint: Ensure Ollama is running on localhost:11434
sagePromptSummarize: Summarize the lesson "{lesson}" in 3 bullet points.
sagePromptExplain: Explain the main concept of the lesson "{lesson}" in simple terms.
sagePromptQuiz: Give me a test question about the lesson "{lesson}".
sageGdprText: This feature downloads a large AI model from the Hugging Face CDN to run locally in your browser.
sageGdprAge: Heads up: this download is about 200MB+ and uses your internet connection.
sageBrowserModelHint: Transformers.js 3.x in the browser works best with small ONNX instruct models (default: Qwen2.5 0.5B). Qwen3.5 0.8B ONNX is a vision+language bundle and often fails in WASM; for the newest Qwen use Local (Ollama) with a qwen3 or qwen2.5 model, or try text-only onnx-community/Qwen3-0.6B-ONNX at your own risk.
privacyText:
1. Data Controller

{impressum}

2. Data Collection & Storage

Local-First Architecture: Arborito is designed as a client-side application. By default, 100% of your data (progress, settings, content) is stored locally in your browser (LocalStorage). We do not operate a backend server to store your personal data.

3. Third-Party Services

Depending on how you use the app, network requests may reach:

  • GitHub Pages: Delivers the static application files.
  • GitHub (raw.githubusercontent.com): The default knowledge tree and optional Arcade catalog are plain JSON over HTTPS. Your browser contacts GitHub when those URLs load; Arborito does not add analytics or ad scripts.
  • jsDelivr & Hugging Face (optional): Only if you enable In-Browser AI and accept the Sage download prompt: the Transformers.js runtime is fetched from jsDelivr and model files from Hugging Face (and related CDNs). The app does not preconnect or prefetch those hosts before you consent.
  • GitHub API (optional): Only when you use features that authenticate or call GitHub.

No marketing stack: No Google Fonts, advertising pixels, tag managers, or social embeds ship with the app shell.

4. Your Rights

You can delete your local data at any time by clearing site data for this origin in your browser.
syncLoginWarningBody: By syncing, your local progress might be overwritten.
arcadeDesc: Context-aware educational games. Play games that adapt to what you are learning.
arcadeDisclaimer: Note: This game can use optional AI to create content as you play.
arcadeDeveloperNote: Developer Note: Games receive context via URL parameters (?source=...&module=...). Create your own engine!
gameAiRequiredDesc: This game needs the optional learning helper to create levels from your lessons.
gameDisclaimer: Arborito acts purely as a visualization client. We assume no responsibility for content generated by third-party AI providers.
plantTreeDesc: Create a new local knowledge tree.
deleteTreeConfirm: Delete this tree and all its content?
editorMagicDraftPrompt: What should this lesson be about?
manualDesc: Plain-language help for the map, the garden, and your data.
roadmapPhase1Desc: Foundation & Content Growth. Prioritizing quantity and stability.
roadmapPhase2Desc: Community & Collaboration. Teacher integration and AI tools.
roadmapPhase3Desc: Decentralized Ecosystem. Towards accreditation and physical spaces.
graphCreateParentError: Could not resolve the parent folder for the new item.
moveNoTargets: No valid folder to move into.
moveLocalUnsupported: Moving nodes is not supported for local trees in this version.
graphMoveDisabledRoot: The curriculum root cannot be moved.
manualIntroText: Topics are arranged as a tree: you move through branches, open lessons like leaves, and watch your habit grow in the garden. Nothing here is a linear course list unless you treat it that way.
manualPhilosophyDesc: Curricula can come from the web, a release, or a file you trust—there is no single global syllabus. What you load and what you export stays under your control in this browser until you choose otherwise.
manualNavDesc: Treat the screen as a small landscape: slide the view, zoom for detail, and open nodes to go deeper.
manualNavPanDesc: Drag the sky or empty background (not the nodes) to slide the map.
manualNavZoomDesc: Use the scroll wheel or the +/− buttons.
manualNavExpandDesc: Tap or click a circle to reveal what sits underneath.
manualNavFocusDesc: Double-click a node to steady the camera on that topic.
manualLearnDesc: Roughly, the levels read from big to small:
manualGardenDesc: Profile turns progress into simple metaphors so you can see momentum at a glance.
manualGardenSeeds: Seeds — earned when you finish a module; they fill your garden view.
manualGardenStreak: Streak — consecutive days you opened Arborito; a gentle nudge, not a grade.
manualGardenXP: Photosynthesis (XP) — points from reading; light gamification, easy to ignore if you prefer.
manualGardenMemory: Memory — older completions can fade; that is a hint to revisit, often through Arcade or a quick reread.
manualArcadeDesc: Short games can use the lesson you have open so practice stays close to what you are studying.
manualConstructDesc: When a source allows edits, construction mode surfaces add, edit, and move tools without leaving the map.
manualDataDesc: Arborito is local-first: your progress lives in this browser until you export it. Backups are yours to store and restore.
manualFirstStepsIntro: A short checklist; the sections below go deeper when you need them. Use the guided tour below anytime for a walkthrough of the main controls.
manualFirstStepMap: Pan the map and open nodes until a lesson opens.
manualFirstStepTrees: Use Trees / Sources to switch curriculum, version, or library.
manualFirstStepProfile: Open Profile for seeds, streak, and your backpack export.
manualFirstStepArcade: Try Arcade when you want quick practice tied to your topics.
manualFirstStepSage: Open Sage (the owl) for explanations, summaries, or optional AI—only if you want it.
manualFirstStepExport: Export from Profile so you always have a file copy of your progress.
manualStartTourHint: Highlights real controls with the owl; you can skip anytime.
manualLearnRootsDesc: Broad subjects at the top of the tree.
manualLearnModulesDesc: Folders that group related lessons together.
manualLearnLessonsDesc: Reading pages—open one when you are ready to study that topic.
manualLearnExamsDesc: Optional challenges spanning a branch; doing well marks stronger mastery on that path.
manualArcadeContextTitle: Why games feel “aware” of your lesson
manualArcadeContextBody: When you start a game, Arborito can pass the current lesson text into the game. The title may use Sage (AI) to shape drills from that text—handy, never required.
manualSageIntro: Sage is the in-app helper: plain explanations, short summaries, or a configured model when you opt in.
manualSageInBrowser: In-browser models on your device (WebGPU/WASM); Arborito servers do not see that traffic.
manualSageLocalDesc: Optional link to Ollama on your machine—private and offline when the model is installed locally.
manualConstructStep1: Turn on construction with the hard-hat control in the bar or under More.
manualConstructStep2: Select a node, then use the dock to add a folder or a lesson.
manualConstructStep3: Edit content with the pencil—it opens Arborito Studio for that item.
manualConstructStep4: Move items: stay in construction mode, select a node, press M, then drop it on the new parent.
manualDataExport: Export — in Profile, download a JSON backpack you can store anywhere you trust.
manualDataImport: Import — load that file on this or another device to restore or merge your progress.
releasesConfirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to remove '{version}'?
adminSelectFolder: Select a folder from the list.
sageArchitectIntro: 👷 Ready to build. What shall we plant?
arcadeGardenEmptyDesc: Complete lessons to start cultivating your memory garden.
arcadeWitheredMsg: These lessons are fading from memory. Play to refresh them!
conRevertConfirm: Revert to last saved state? Unsaved changes will be lost.
backpackDesc: Your progress is auto-saved in this browser. Download a file to keep it safe.
sageBuildLocalOnly: You can only build in a local garden.
releasesVersionCreatedBody:
Version "{name}" folder created.

Note: In a live environment, run the Builder Script to compile the content snapshot into this folder.
arcadeDeleteSaveConfirm: Delete save data for this game?
pdfPopupBlocked: Pop-up blocked. Allow pop-ups for PDF generation.
adminTrashConfirmAgain: Click trash again to confirm delete.
editorGithubRateLimit: GitHub rate limit exceeded. Try again later.
editorRescueMode: Rescue mode: saving will fix the missing file.
gameStorageFullWarn: Storage full. Delete old saves in the Arcade menu.
sageSettingsBrowserDesc: Runs directly in your browser using the CPU. Data stays on this device.
sageBlueprintStructureMessage: Here is the structure you requested.
gameConsentAiNotice: This game uses AI. To run locally, Arborito must download model files from the Hugging Face CDN.
gameAiErrorLead: Nothing is wrong on your side. You can try again in a moment.
gameAiErrorOllama: Could not connect to local AI (Ollama). Make sure it is running on localhost:11434.
gameAiErrorBrowser: The learning helper isn’t ready yet. Open the Sage menu and finish initializing in-browser AI.
gameAiErrorInitFailed: The learning helper could not finish starting.
gameCrashedLead: Game player — loading issue. You didn’t do anything wrong.
